summary_line: Forge Run Summary: 100 in -> 1 dupes dropped -> 0 malformed dropped -> 11 already-have dropped -> 88 valid remaining -> Top 10 ranked & routed.
win_test_question: Are these the 10 you would have picked by hand, or better?
win_test_card: CLOUD-SEC-023 score=50 [ws-run|Trigger.dev] Cloud implement smallest run-detail slice PASS/FAIL
CLOUD-SEC-005 score=44 [ws-ux|Trigger.dev] Diff copy vs Trigger.dev — fix top gap in cloud repo
CLOUD-SEC-037 score=44 [ws-onboard|Trigger.dev] Fix one onboarding friction vs Trigger.dev — cloud
CLOUD-SEC-024 score=42 [ws-run|Trigger.dev] Wire cloud factory receipt emit on run complete
CLOUD-SEC-073 score=42 [ws-run|Inngest] Cloud run-detail slice PASS/FAIL
CLOUD-SEC-003 score=40 [ws-ux|Trigger.dev] Cloud sandbox smallest Hub UX slice — FORGE deploy preview URL
CLOUD-SEC-038 score=40 [ws-onboard|Trigger.dev] Wire cloud dispatch hook for onboarding — API only
CLOUD-SEC-088 score=40 [ws-onboard|Inngest] Wire cloud dispatch hook onboarding
CLOUD-SEC-007 score=36 [ws-ux|Trigger.dev] ICP one-liner evidence row — Trigger.dev vs ours
CLOUD-SEC-015 score=36 [ws-pricing|Trigger.dev] PLG motion compare row — Trigger.dev vs us
